# Castle.ai

> Castle.ai is an AI-powered chess assistant and move analyzer that helps chess players of all skill levels improve their game through real-time position analysis, move suggestions, and strategic explanations.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://castle-ai.vercel.app/): Main product page with overview of Castle.ai's AI chess analysis features

## About

Castle.ai uses a neural-network-based chess engine to analyze board positions and provide human-readable explanations of optimal moves. It is designed for casual players, club players, and competitive tournament participants.

## Core Features

- Real-time chess move analysis
- AI-generated strategic explanations
- Position evaluation and scoring
- Compatible with standard FEN notation

## Contact

For inquiries, visit https://castle-ai.vercel.app/
